title: The Brown Derby
writer: Brian Marlow, J.P. McGowan, E.S. Merlin
actors: Johnny Hines, Diana Kane, Ruth Dwyer
plot: Tommy Burke, an easy-going young plumber, is left a brown derby by his recently deceased uncle. The derby is said to bring good luck to its wearer, and it's not long before its powers apparently start paying off--Tommy finds himse...
